baseline._note: PRD said 1500+; actual wc -l at iteration start was 2492

current._note: Zero ruff errors. pytest 1 -> 8 after Quality Scaffold added retry + session-lock tests. Format pass still pending (46 files). PRD §Completion wants pytest >= 30 and ruff format clean — two of six targets left.

findings.description: Ruff autofixes (F401, UP017, I001, UP041, RUF100, F541, UP035, RUF022) + 5 dead helper functions (_md5, _format_scored_row, _now in crystal, _stream_response, _msg_dicts). Ruff errors 121->51.

Ruff style/correctness (SIM105, B904, B905, E402, E701, SIM102/103, RUF005) + ruff-config ignore for RUF001-003 math notation + DRY consolidation of 7 _now / 2 _now_iso duplicates into new api/_time.py. Ruff errors 51->8. B904 fix counts as a bug class — six HTTPException raises were masking their original cause in tracebacks.

findings.perspective: Senior Dev Audit (server.py split, Option A)
findings.description: Split api/server.py (2 417 -> 688 LOC) into 9 resource-scoped routers under api/routes/: agents, auth, contacts, feed, lake, media, routines, sessions, sources, vitals. Promoted current_contact_slug helper to api/auth.py. URLs unchanged; tests stayed green.

Fixed all 8 RUF006 asyncio-dangling-task sites. New api/_bgtasks.spawn helper adds strong task refs + logs exceptions (both failure modes the RUF006 idiom leaks). One commit per site/cluster. Chat-listener race audit + feed_loop off-by-one audit: no real bugs found beyond a minor unbounded _session_locks dict (tracked under Quality Scaffold or Performance).

Added _request_with_retry to api/delta_client.py with 3-attempt jittered exponential backoff on transient 502/503/504 and httpx Transport/Timeout errors. Applied to every idempotent read (~19 functions). Writes NOT retried because delta-store has no idempotency keys. Bounded ChatListener._session_locks with LRU eviction at 256 entries. 7 new unit tests (retry contract + session-lock cap).

_now_helper.note: Hoisted into api/_time.py. Seven modules under api/ now import `now as _now` and `now_iso as _now_iso`. pairing._now returns int (different semantics) and delta-store retrievals._now are out of scope — stayed local.

cosine_distance.note: api/crystal_anchor.py cosine_distance and api/feed_crystal.py _cosine_distance are near-duplicate implementations. Candidate for consolidation into api/_time.py or a new api/_math.py.

server_py_split.note: Option A (by resource) — 9 routers under api/routes/. server.py 2 417 -> 688 LOC. Chat + crystal + fathom_think + _resolve_tools still in server.py (~200 lines); separate cleanup-pass ticket.
